evals.name: section-product-spotlight-index-between
evals.prompt:
Build this Figma into a new Shopify section for me and drop it on the homepage.

Template: index.json
Position: After "Hero - Split", before "Collection Grid"
Desktop: https://www.figma.com/design/gT3s03RRUege4MMMuOlyXK/AnitaJackelLeatherDesign.com?node-id=2001-828
Mobile: https://www.figma.com/design/gT3s03RRUege4MMMuOlyXK/AnitaJackelLeatherDesign.com?node-id=2001-301
evals.expected_output: New sections/<kebab-name>.liquid with full schema + scoped dynamic style + static stylesheet + preset. Updated templates/index.json with the new section wired between the two named sections. Theme-check: zero new offenses.

evals.name: section-explicit-order-product-template
evals.prompt:
Add this as a new section on my product template at position 4.

Template: product.json
Position: Order #4
Desktop: https://www.figma.com/design/gT3s03RRUege4MMMuOlyXK/Example?node-id=123-456
Mobile: https://www.figma.com/design/gT3s03RRUege4MMMuOlyXK/Example?node-id=123-789
evals.expected_output: New sections/<kebab-name>.liquid created, inserted at the 4th entry (index 3) of product.json's order array. Skill asks clarifying questions about section name, product data source, and color mode before writing.

evals.name: section-missing-mobile-url
evals.prompt:
Hey, can you turn this Figma into a new section on the homepage?

Template: index.json
Position: After "Testimonials"
Desktop: https://www.figma.com/design/gT3s03RRUege4MMMuOlyXK/Design?node-id=2001-828
evals.expected_output: Skill detects the missing mobile URL and asks for it via AskUserQuestion before proceeding. Does not guess or proceed without it.

evals.name: block-register-only
evals.prompt:
Turn this Figma design into a new reusable Shopify block. Just register it — don't place it in a template yet.

Type: block
Parent: Register only
Desktop: https://www.figma.com/design/gT3s03RRUege4MMMuOlyXK/Design?node-id=3100-100
Mobile: https://www.figma.com/design/gT3s03RRUege4MMMuOlyXK/Design?node-id=3100-200
evals.expected_output: New blocks/<kebab-name>.liquid file with {% doc %} header, {{ block.shopify_attributes }} on the root element, schema without "tag" at top level, scoped to #<slug>-{{ block.id }}. No template JSON changes. No parent section schema changes.

evals.name: block-add-to-section-schema
evals.prompt:
Create this Figma design as a new block type and make it available inside the Hero section of my homepage.

Type: block
Parent: In sections/hero-glass.liquid schema
Position: (new block type in schema, order doesn't matter)
Desktop: https://www.figma.com/design/gT3s03RRUege4MMMuOlyXK/Design?node-id=3200-100
Mobile: https://www.figma.com/design/gT3s03RRUege4MMMuOlyXK/Design?node-id=3200-200
evals.expected_output: New blocks/<kebab-name>.liquid file. sections/hero-glass.liquid's {% schema %} "blocks" array has a new entry `{ "type": "<kebab-name>" }`. No template JSON changes (no instance placed; just registered as an available block type for the Hero section).

evals.name: block-insert-instance-in-template
evals.prompt:
Add this Figma as a new block inside the existing 'Collection Grid' section on my homepage, at position 2 of its block order.

Type: block
Parent: Inside "Collection Grid" in index.json
Position: Order #2 within block_order
Desktop: https://www.figma.com/design/gT3s03RRUege4MMMuOlyXK/Design?node-id=3300-100
Mobile: https://www.figma.com/design/gT3s03RRUege4MMMuOlyXK/Design?node-id=3300-200
evals.expected_output: New blocks/<kebab-name>.liquid created. templates/index.json modified: the 'Collection Grid' section's blocks object has a new entry `block_<xxx>` with `type: <kebab-name>`, and block_order has it inserted at position 2 (index 1).
